allow: PowerShell($timeout = 120; $elapsed = 0; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { try { $result = docker info 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Output "Docker is ready after $elapsed seconds"; break } } catch {} Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5; if \($elapsed -ge $timeout\) { Write-Output "Timeout waiting for Docker" } })
PowerShell(docker compose exec api bash -c "composer install")
PowerShell(docker compose exec api bash -c "composer run phinx:migrate")
PowerShell(docker compose exec api bash -c "composer run phinx:seed")
